docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALEX
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-29-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLERAN, ANTHONY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALEX RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLERAN, ANTHONY $4,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,840.00, THE PARTIES AGREE THAT IF THE CAR IS DIMINISHED IN VALUE EVEN AFTER REPAIRS ARE PAID FOR THEN PLAINTIFF CAN RECOVER FOR THE DIMINUTION IN VALUE. SEE DEFENDANT'S TRIAL BRIEF AT 2:10-11. DEFENDANT ASSERTS THAT THERE IS NO DIMINUTION BECAUSE THE CAR WAS REPAIRED TO ITS PRE-LOSS CONDITION, BUT PROVIDES NO EVIDENCE OR APPRAISAL TO SUPPORT HIS ASSERTION. PLAINTIFF PROVIDES EVIDENCE THAT EVEN WITH REPAIRS THERE IS AN IMMEDIATE REDUCTION IN MARKET VALUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ALEX CHAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY HOLLERMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLERAN, ANTHONY
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,435.00 FILED BY CHAN, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLERAN, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ALEX AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLERAN, ANTHONY
